title: Petco Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
text: Petco Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results. Full Year 2025 Highlights: Net revenue of $6.0 billion, down 2.5% year-over-year. Adjusted EBITDA of $408.2 million, up 21.3% year-over-year. Net income of $9.1 million compared to net loss of $101.8 million in prior year. Free cash flow of $187.0 million, up 276.3% versus prior year. Q4 2025 Results: Comparable sales declined 1.6%. Gross margin expanded 68 basis points to 38.9%. Adjusted EBITDA reached $118.8 million. Balance Sheet: Cash position increased to $256.7 million following $95 million in voluntary debt paydown. Leverage ratio improved to 3.0x from 4.2x at prior year-end. Debt maturity extended to 2031 through refinancing. Strategic Achievements: Company exceeded 300 veterinary hospitals and 1,600 Vetco clinics. Services revenue (vet, grooming, training) grew in the quarter. 2026 Outlook: Management projects flat to +1.5% net sales growth with adjusted EBITDA of $415-430 million. Expected net store closures of 15-20 locations. Q1 2026 guidance: net sales down 1% to flat with adjusted EBITDA of $92-94 million.
